Notice Of Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the minors, Alexander Grechko and Nicholas Grechko.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Gene Halavanau, Esq. and Aleksandr A. Volkov, Esq. appeared with petitioner Sergey Grechko, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors, Alexander Grechko and Nicholas Grechko, who were not present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Olga Grechko, Mother of the two minors, was placed under oath but did not testify.
Orders appointing Mr. Grechko Guardian ad Litem for the minors were filed on January 31, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petitions are granted and the compromises are approved as follows:

Alexander Grechko:
Settlement Amount - $8,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,000.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $187.00.
Costs - $180.94.

The net balance of $5,632.06 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 5455 Geary Boulevard, San Francisco, CA 94121. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.als shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Nicholas Grechko:
Settlement Amount - $12,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $3,000.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $275.00.
Costs - $155.94.

The net balance of $8,569.06 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 5455 Geary Boulevard, San Francisco, CA 94121. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.als shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to May 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into the Blocked Accounts.
